thag6.12:1.2: in one without anger tamed, calmed, living in tune,
thag6.12:2.2: when you flare up at someone who’s angry.
thag6.12:2.3: Whoever doesn’t flare up at someone who’s angry
thag6.12:2.4: wins a battle hard to win.
thag6.12:3.1: You live for the good of both
thag6.12:4.1: When you work the cure of both
thag6.12:4.3: those who think you a fool
thag6.12:6.2: after sensual pleasures & states of becoming,
thag6.12:6.4: as you would a bad ox eating grain.
